title: Launch of Project Development Assistance (PDA) Programme for Hydrogen Valleys
content: The PDA programme offers tailored expert support services in commercial, technical, regulatory and governance dimensions to advance Hydrogen Valleys across the European Union and in countries associated to Horizon Europe towards the Final Investment Decision (FID). With this Call for Applications, up to 15 PDAs in total (light and plus) will be awarded to eligible projects.
author: Analysts Account
